title: AIIMS Nagpur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 80 Faculty Posts
organization: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Nagpur (AIIMS Nagpur)
short_info: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Nagpur (AIIMS Nagpur) Faculty Notification 2026 has been released on 09 May 2026 on the official website aiimsnagpur.edu.in. A total of 80 vacancies have been announced through the AIIMS Nagpur Faculty Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Professor/Additional Professor: Maximum 58 years Associate Professor & Assistant Professor: Maximum 50 years Retired Faculty: Up to 70 years Age Relaxation: OBC: 3 years, SC/ST: 5 years, PwD: 10 years, Central Govt servants / Ex-servicemen: 5 years

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS + MD/MS/DM/MCh, PhD (for non-medical like Biochemistry), Teaching/Research Experience
qualification.details: Professor: MBBS + MD/MS (broad specialty) or DM/MCh (super-specialty) + 14 years teaching experience Additional Professor: MBBS + MD/MS/DM/MCh + 10 years teaching experience Associate Professor: MBBS + MD/MS/DM/MCh + 6 years teaching experience Assistant Professor: MBBS + MD/MS/DM/MCh + 3 years teaching experience

salary_details.details: Professor: Level-14A ₹1,68,900 – 2,20,400 Additional Professor: Level-13A2+ ₹1,48,200 – 2,11,400 Associate Professor: Level-13A1+ ₹1,38,300 – 2,09,200 Assistant Professor: Level-12 ₹1,01,500 – 1,67,400

selection_process: Shortlisting based on bio-data / Search-cum-Selection Committee Interview Document verification Medical fitness
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Nagpur Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 08-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Nagpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Nagpur Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The closing date for the online application process is 08 June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Faculty posts at AIIMS Nagpur?
faq.answer: AIIMS Nagpur has announced a total of 80 vacancies for various Faculty positions, including Professor, Additional Professor, Associate Professor, and Assistant Professor.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for Assistant Professor?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification for the Assistant Professor post is MBBS along with MD/MS/DM/MCh and at least 3 years of teaching experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to the Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 58 years for Professor and Additional Professor, and 50 years for Associate Professor and Assistant Professor. Retired faculty can apply up to 70 years.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for AIIMS Nagpur Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee. General/OBC candidates need to pay Rs. 2000, while SC/ST candidates need to pay Rs. 500. Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) are exempted from the fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for these Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 1,01,500 to Rs. 2,20,400 per month, depending on the specific post and the corresponding pay level.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for AIIMS Nagpur Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting based on bio-data, followed by an interview, document verification, and a medical fitness test.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from other states apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification mentions that applications are invited from eligible candidates in Maharashtra. However, it's always best to check the detailed official notification for any specific state domicile requirements.

faq.question: Q9. What is the mode of application for these posts?
faq.answer: The application process is entirely online. Candidates need to visit the official AIIMS Nagpur website or use the provided link to submit their applications.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is highly recommended to download and read it thoroughly before applying.
